name: trae-prompt-optimizer
description: Optimize rough coding prompts into structured Trae-ready engineering prompts inspired by Harness.

commands.title: Trae Prompt Optimizer: Set AI API Key

traePromptOptimizer.ai.baseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible API base URL, for example https://api.openai.com/v1 or a local/third-party compatible endpoint.

traePromptOptimizer.ai.model.description: Model name used by the OpenAI-compatible prompt optimization request.

traePromptOptimizer.ai.systemPrompt.default: You are a senior prompt engineer for coding agents. Return only the optimized prompt in Markdown.
traePromptOptimizer.ai.systemPrompt.description: System prompt sent to the optional AI optimizer.

traePromptOptimizer.traeChatCommand.description: Command ID used to open Trae Chat or a compatible chat panel after copying the optimized prompt.
